markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To understand Mark's lead generation and email outreach process.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clay is a deep tool:** Go beyond list enrichment to learn its full capabilities (e.g., intent signal scraping, data cleaning) via free resources like Clay University and Eric Novoslawski's videos.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Instantly is for scale:** Use it to manage hundreds of email accounts, warm them up to avoid spam filters, and automate sending.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [**Build your own infrastructure:** Purchase separate domains and email accounts, then connect them to Instantly to maintain full control and flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**Learn from influencers:** Follow the LinkedIn experts listed in Mark's Slack message to get free, practical insights on these tools and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Clay: Beyond List Enrichment

  - [Jesus's goal: Learn Mark's lead generation process, starting with Clay.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [Mark's advice: Use free resources to master Clay's full capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Clay University:** The platform's official training program.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [**Eric Novoslawski:** A key influencer whose videos cover list building, cleaning, and enrichment.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Clay's advanced features include:](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Intent signal scraping](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Data cleaning](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [CRM enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Mark noted a paid course, "Clay Boot Camp," is not necessary, as its creators share similar content for free on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)

### Instantly: Scaling Email Outreach

  - [Instantly's role: A powerful email platform for managing and sending from hundreds of accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Key function: Automated account warming.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Simulates human sending behavior to build a positive sender reputation and avoid spam filters.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Understory's infrastructure setup:](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Domains:** Purchased from various providers.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Email Accounts:** Purchased separately.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Connection:** Both are linked to Instantly for campaign execution.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This method provides more control than buying accounts directly through Instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jesus:**](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [Review the Slack message from Mark with recommended books, courses, and influencers.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Follow the suggested influencers on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
      - [Study Clay University and Eric Novoslawski's videos to learn Clay's advanced features.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
      - [Connect with Mark if more questions arise after reviewing the materials.](https://fathom.video/share/g5SvievR-oEL8jM1-3uEd81DXuDnqMyf?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
